2604.27277.title: BrainDINO: A Brain MRI Foundation Model for Generalizable Clinical Representation Learning
2604.27277.paper_summary: Brain MRI underpins a wide range of neuroscientific and clinical applications, yet most learning-based methods remain task-specific and require substantial labeled data. Here we show that a single self-supervised representation can generalize across heterogeneous brain MRI endpoints. We trained BrainDINO, a self-distilled foundation model, on approximately 6.6 million unlabeled axial slices from 20 datasets encompassing broad variation in population, disease, and acquisition setting. Using a frozen encoder with lightweight task heads, BrainDINO supported transfer across tumor segmentation, neurodegenerative and neurodevelopmental conditions classification, brain age estimation, post-stroke temporal prediction, molecular status prediction, MRI sequence classification, and survival modeling. Across tasks and supervision regimes, BrainDINO consistently equaled or exceeded natural-image and MRI-specific self-supervised baselines, with particularly strong advantages under label scarcity. Representation analyses further showed anatomically organized and pathology-sensitive feature structure in the absence of task-specific supervision. Our findings indicate that large-scale slice-wise self-supervised learning can yield a unified brain MRI representation that supports diverse neuroimaging tasks without volumetric pretraining or full-network fine-tuning, establishing a scalable foundation for robust and data-efficient brain imaging analysis.
2604.27277.paper_summary_zh: 腦部MRI支撐著廣泛的神經科學和臨床應用，然而大多數基於學習的方法仍然是任務特定的，並且需要大量標記數據。<lb/>在這裡，我們展示了一個單一的自我監督表示可以在異質腦部MRI終點之間進行泛化。<lb/>我們在來自20個數據集的約660萬個未標記的軸向切片上訓練了BrainDINO，一個自我蒸餾的基礎模型，這些數據集涵蓋了人口、疾病和獲取設置的廣泛變化。<lb/>使用一個凍結的編碼器和輕量級的任務頭，BrainDINO支持在腫瘤分割、神經退行性和神經發展性疾病分類、腦齡估計、中風後時間預測、分子狀態預測、MRI序列分類和生存建模之間的轉移。<lb/>在各種任務和監督體系中，BrainDINO始終達到或超過自然圖像和MRI特定的自我監督基準，尤其在標籤稀缺的情況下具有特別強大的優勢。<lb/>表示分析進一步顯示，在缺乏任務特定監督的情況下，具有解剖組織化和病理敏感的特徵結構。我們的發現表明，大規模切片級自我監督學習可以產生一個統一的腦部MRI表示，支持多樣的神經影像任務，而無需體積預訓練或全網絡微調，為穩健且數據高效的腦部影像分析建立了可擴展的基礎。
2604.27277.author: Yizhou Wu et.al.
2604.27277.authors: Yizhou Wu, Shansong Wang, Yuheng Li, Mojtaba Safari, Mingzhe Hu, Chih-Wei Chang, Harini Veeraraghavan, Xiaofeng Yang
